stdout:
Usage: gaia search lkm feedback [OPTIONS] CONTENT

 Submit LKM service/data feedback (POST /feedback).

╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    content      TEXT  Feedback body, non-empty after trimming. [required]  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *  --type                     [bug|feature|question]  Feedback type.         │
│                                                       [required]             │
│    --index,--server           TEXT                    Configured LKM index   │
│                                                       id.                    │
│                                                       [default: bohrium]     │
│    --gcn-id                   TEXT                    Optional linked GCN    │
│                                                       node id.               │
│    --paper-metadata-id        TEXT                    Optional linked paper  │
│                                                       metadata id.           │
│    --out                      PATH                    Write JSON to PATH     │
│                                                       (atomic) instead of    │
│                                                       stdout.                │
│    --help                                             Show this message and  │
│                                                       exit.                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

 Submit LKM service/data feedback. This endpoint writes a feedback record and
 returns no knowledge content. Link at most one target: --gcn-id for a node or
 --paper-metadata-id for a paper metadata record.
 API docs:
 https://s.apifox.cn/<UUID4>/api-474487249
 Endpoint links: gaia search lkm docs
